sableprotect.claim.no_target: You are not looking at a sub-level.
sableprotect.claim.already_claimed: This sub-level is already claimed as '%s'.
sableprotect.claim.too_small: This sub-level is too small to claim.
sableprotect.not_owner: You are not the owner of this claim.
sableprotect.unclaim.confirm: Are you sure you want to unclaim '%s'? Run /sp unclaim %1$s CONFIRM to proceed.
sableprotect.edit.already_owner: That player is already the owner.
sableprotect.fetch.success: Fetched '%s' to %s. Physics frozen for %s seconds.
sableprotect.fetch.not_authorized: Only the owner or a member can fetch this sub-level.
sableprotect.fetch.inside_border: That sub-level is already inside the world border.
sableprotect.fetch.failed: Could not fetch the sub-level (no physics handle).
sableprotect.fetch.freeze_unavailable: Physics freeze is not available in this dimension.
sableprotect.bypass.enabled: Admin bypass ENABLED — you now bypass all claim protection.
sableprotect.bypass.disabled: Admin bypass DISABLED — claim protection now applies to you.
sableprotect.bypass.not_eligible: You do not meet the configured permission level (%s) for admin bypass.
sableprotect.info.nml_hover: This sub-level is currently inside No Man's Land — claim protections are suspended.
sableprotect.info.unloaded_hover: This sub-level is not currently loaded. Fetch and steal are unavailable until it loads again.
sableprotect.steal.confirm: Are you sure you want to steal '%s'? Run /sp steal %1$s CONFIRM to proceed.
sableprotect.steal.success: Stole '%s'. You are now the owner.
sableprotect.steal.not_in_nml: '%s' is not currently inside No Man's Land.
sableprotect.steal.not_on_board: You must be on board '%s' to steal it.
sableprotect.steal.crew_present: Cannot steal — %s (owner or member) is still nearby.
sableprotect.steal.notification: %s has stolen your sub-level '%s' in No Man's Land.
